data.body: 21dd plan-review returned BLOCK. Remediated ticket description: (1) precise reconcile._apply_mutations insertion point (if persist: check_store_compat after persist=ctx.persist bound; no top-level guard exists), (2) CRITICAL run_ensures broad except Exception swallows StoreIncompatibleError -> add except StoreIncompatibleError: raise before it so init/MCP-boot/fsck-repair fail closed, (3) defined structured compat_error {kind,detail} output + non-raising describe_store_compat() for read-allowance AC6 jq check. 36c7 review died on transient git/SSH auth error (no verdict) - will re-run. Re-running both serially.
